Sample-Based LUT Generator
Assign sampled colours to Shadows, Midtones and Highlights. The app builds a real .cube LUT that grades your image toward your chosen palette.
Shadows
#1A1A2E
Midtones
#C09870

Preview
Tap a saved colour to assign it — or use the root colour above

Using your .cube in Capture One

  1. Tap .cube above and AirDrop to your Mac
  2. Styles & Presets right-click Open User Styles
  3. Place .cube in ICC Profiles & Camera LUTs
  4. Restart Capture One  appears under Color LUT
CCT converted to °C (Kelvin − 273). Select a single colour to see its lighting science.

Output Format
Outputs only the selected hex codes — all text modifiers are ignored. Paste directly into Midjourney's --cref or colour fields.
Batch Mode
Wraps multi-selections in {}
MJ will generate one image per combination  e.g. {etching, woodblock print} creates 2 separate renders.
Select multiple Mediums or Subjects to activate.
